case_title: THE GRANADA, INC. vs. DUNI, DAVID et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN LIEU OF PERSONAL TESTIMONY FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE GRANADA, INC., A CA CORPORATION DBA THE GAYLORD
